description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Test Builds on Windows that triggers on push, pull request, and workflow dispatch events. Run a job on a Windows 2022 environment that checks out the code with submodules, sets up glslangValidator, Meson, and Visual Studio, downloads D3D8 SDK headers, and builds the project with MSVC for both x86 and x64 architectures. Prepare and upload the build artifacts.
